c.d: The diversity of streaming content available, including live streams, movies, TV shows, and user-generated content.
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, Expert Reviews

c.d: The ease of navigation, search functionality, and overall user-friendliness of the app.
The resolution, stability, and buffering frequency of the streamed video.
The level of community engagement, interactive features like chat, and opportunities for content creators and viewers to connect.
The range of devices (smartphones, tablets, smart TVs, etc.) that the app supports.
c.s: App Specifications, Google Play Store, App Store
